composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py
- Ensure Flask app correctly locates and renders all HTML templates by verifying and configuring the 'templates' directory path if needed.
- Maintain all existing backend functionalities including routing for all nine frontend pages, data file read/write operations, and data management for articles, categories, bookmarks, comments, and trending articles as per the specified formats.
- Confirm that the first page is accessible at route '/' (Dashboard page) and that all URLs in frontend code are Flask routes.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure backend data and routes align with frontend templates.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop and organize frontend templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Place all nine HTML template files (dashboard.html, article_catalog.html, article_details.html, bookmarks.html, comments.html, write_comment.html, trending_articles.html, category.html, search_results.html) correctly inside the 'templates/' directory so Flask can locate them.
- Implement the HTML templates with the specified page titles, overviews, and elements with correct IDs as per the requirements document.
- Ensure all navigation buttons and links use Flask routes (not static HTML file names).
- Implement dynamic rendering of data passed from backend (articles, categories, bookmarks, comments, trending data).
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure frontend templates correctly consume backend data and routes.
